parameters.name: before
parameters.label: Cycles Before
parameters.description: The number of cycles to loop before the input . This parameter can be fractional.

parameters.name: after
parameters.label: Cycles After
parameters.description: The number of cycles to loop after the input . This parameter can be fractional.

parameters.name: mirror
parameters.label: Mirror Cycles
parameters.description: If enabled, consecutive cycles are mirror images (reversed) of each another. The first cycle is never mirrored.

parameters.name: extremes
parameters.label: Blend Start to End
parameters.description: If on, the end of the is blended into the start of the to produce a smooth loop. If Cycles Before and Cycles After are 0, Region is non-zero, and are "Cycle", it loops smoothly forever.

parameters.name: blendfunc
parameters.label: Shape
parameters.description: The shape of the blending function:

parameters.name: blendregion
parameters.label: Region
parameters.description: The size of the blend region, in either seconds, samples or frames (set with Units in the Common page).

parameters.name: blendbias
parameters.label: Bias
parameters.description: The bias of the blend. A -1 biases the blend toward the beginning of the blend region, 0 is no bias and +1 biases towards the end of the blend region.

parameters.name: step
parameters.label: Step
parameters.description: If set to 1, the next cycle will be shifted up or down in value, so that it begins where the last cycle ended. Suitable for the root object of walk cycles.

parameters.name: stepscope
parameters.label: Step Scope
parameters.description: The names of those channels that will be affected by the Step parameter.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
